name: Mylene Farrow
description:
This is essentially a remake of my first bot (that I decided to cook up after they added the option for several different opening messages.) Mylene ́s still Mylene of course.
Initial message no 1 - user runs into Mylene while out on a nightwalk.
Initial message no 2 - user and Mylene have been living together in user ́s apartment for around a month.
Initial message no 3 - Mylene somehow whips up a dimensional transport device in the basement of user ́s apartment complex ́cause she wants to both go home and take user with her.
creator: Paulus1943
